articles.title: Cardano (ADA) vs. Bitcoin (BTC): Which Crypto is a Better Investment Now?
articles.description: Cardano’s (ADA) latest analysis shows promising signs of a potential price surge. Cardano advocate Dan Gamberdello has ignited community excitement by stating that the token is primed for a breakout. Other analysts echo this sentiment, suggesting now is an opportune time to swap Bitcoin (BTC) for ADA. In the 4-hour chart, ADA trades at $0.410, […]

articles.title: Cardano Founder Hits Back at “Dead Coin” Claims
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, the founder of Cardano, recently responded to crypto influencer BitBoy Crypto’s claim that Cardano’s ADA token is “dead.” On July 3, Ben Armstrong, known online as BitBoy Crypto, took to Twitter (recently rebranded as X) to share his views on leading cryptocurrencies like Polkadot (DOT) and Cardano (ADA). He asserted that both ADA […] The post Cardano Founder Hits Back at “Dead Coin” Claims appeared first on Coin Edition.

articles.title: Bitcoin Price Crash Is Buy Opportunity As Wallets Holding 10+ BTC Reaches New ATH
articles.description: Bitcoin continues to be incredibly bearish amid negative market headwinds but that has not stopped investors from taking their positions during this time. These large investors who are holding more than $600,000 worth of Bitcoin have been accumulating BTC at an accelerated rate over the last six months.
